title: Set of 3, Rattan Serving Tray, Rectangular Wicker Tray, Natural Woven Decorative Serving Baskets for Organizing Tabletop Kitchen Counter
features: Material: Made of 100% durable Vietnam rattan without paint, 100% traditional handcraft by artisan, adds a natural and idyllic atmosphere to your home.
Size: Set of 3 rectangular baskets. S: 21 x 11 x4.5 cm (8.3 x 4.3 x 1.8 inch) M: 21 x 21 x 4.5 cm (8.3 x 8.3 x 1.8 inch) L: 37 x 23 x 4.7 cm (14.6 x 9.1 x 1.9 inch)
Occasion: Widely used to everywhere, such as bedroom, kitchen, dining room, living room, restaurant, coffee table for serving, baking, displaying, storing, organizing.
Application: Perfect for storing food, fruit, bread, snacks, candies, nuts, jewels, rings, keys, remote control, wallet, toiletries, Great gift for wedding or festivals.
Cleaning: Simply clean with damp cloth then store in a dry place.
description: Product Description YANGQIHOME Rattan Rectangular Serving Tray (Set of 3) Material: 100% durable Vietnam rattan, 100% traditional handcraft. Size: S: 21 x 11 x4.5 cm (8.3 x 4.3 x 1.8 inch) M: 21 x 21 x 4.5 cm (8.3 x 8.3 x 1.8 inch) L: 37 x 23 x 4.7 cm (14.6 x 9.1 x 1.9 inch) Features: Widely used in bedroom, kitchen, dining room, living room, restaurant, coffee table for serving, baking, displaying, storing, organizing. Perfect for storing food, fruit, bread, snacks, candies, nuts, jewels, rings, keys, remote control, wallet, toiletries Great gift for wedding or festivals Cleaning: Simply clean with damp cloth then store in a dry place. There are no limit on the placement of this rattan product, you could place it on table, shelf, bathroom, bedroom, kitchen.
